requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL persist observability XNL file sinks according to the same append-only versus replace-state classification used by session persistence.

case.given: An observability trace sink writes records to `sessions/<sessionId>/trace.xnl` or a caller-provided `trace.xnl` path
case.then: The sink SHALL append one complete top-level `TraceEntry` XNL trace record per event
The sink SHALL NOT rewrite a growing root wrapper for trace history
`TraceEntry` SHALL include `traceKind` metadata to distinguish observability trace from graph trace when both producers share the tag
Single typed children such as `Payload`, `Error`, or `Value` SHALL use `()`; multiple typed children SHALL use `[]`

case.given: A SceneStore persists replay or observability XNL files in a project workspace
case.when: The store resolves its root directory
case.then: The files SHALL be placed under `.eidolon/scenes/<sessionId>/`
The store SHALL NOT create workspace-root `scenes/` data directories as normal project output

case.given: A scene store records turn or scene events
case.then: The event SHALL be appended as one complete top-level `SceneMessage` XNL element
Ordered `TextPart` and `ToolCall` children SHALL use `[]` even when a message currently has one text part
The manifest MAY be replace-written as a `SceneManifest` because it is bounded scene state rather than event history
The manifest SHALL NOT contain the growing event log
`SceneManifest` SHALL contain typed children such as `SystemPrompt` and `ToolDefs` using `[]`
